prompt: 시뮬레이터에서 돌아가는 앱 UI 리뷰해줘. appId는 com.example.myapp이야.

assertions.text: Skill returns a message to the main model requesting ios-simulator agent to capture a screenshot
The response explicitly mentions ios-simulator agent as the tool to use for screenshot capture
The screenshot request includes the appId (com.example.myapp) for the ios-simulator agent
Skill does NOT directly run xcrun simctl commands — delegates to ios-simulator agent via main model
